raw_response: Given your preference for Anker and need for a high-quality charger that can handle multiple devices, the Anker Prime 100W GaN charger is an excellent choice. It offers robust charging capabilities with two USB-C ports and one USB-A port, making it ideal for simultaneously powering laptops and smartphones. Despite its premium price, its compact form factor and superior build quality make it a worthwhile investment for those who value performance over cost concerns.
